front: Novel: chapters each begin with a recipe; opens by urging the reader to place an onion on their head to keep from crying; begins with a recipe for sausage rolls
Novel: Mama Elena forbids her youngest daughter from marrying; ends with the ghosts of the protagonist and Pedro setting fire to a ranch
Novel: features the Native American grandmother Morning Light; a woman dies 'sighing out her last flatulent breath'
Novel: historical novel about La Malinche (named Malinalli), who falls in love with Cortes after identifying him with Quetzalcoatl
Author: wrote Swift as Desire about telegraph operator Jubilo Chi, 'good at communicating and at loving Lucha'
